name: Clone Vat Experiments
desc: Primitive cloning vats repurposed from pre-collapse biotechnology.  An early step in mastering human cloning technology. Produces a trickle flow of cloned human females to supplement natural population growth, however these clones are not fully "concious" and thus cannot perform tasks as well as their natural counterparts do, which incurs a stability penalty.

name: Cloning Industry
desc: Facilities and infrastructure for the purpose of cloning human beings from nothing. These humans have not lived a life, but had one simulated by an alpha-level AI. The humans produced this way are weaker, frail, but not as mentally stunted due to their simulated experiences. They will most likely succumb to diseases or injuries way faster than normal human beings. They are, however, perfectly capable of reproducing sexually just as normal humans do, as well as perfectly capable of performing regular tasks. This leads to massively increased population growth

name: Cloning Megafactory
desc: An industrial-scale cloning operation capable of producing near-human clones. The sheer volume of clone output transforms even a modest colony into a population powerhouse, however, the social cost is extreme - violence, crime and disease run rampant among the clone-majority population.
